summary: The main live event is the IPL 2026 match between Rajasthan Royals and Chennai Super Kings, which is currently in progress or has just finished based on search results. The Sheffield Shield Final has concluded with South Australia winning. The AFC U20 Asian Cup China, 2025, also concluded earlier in March 2025.
